title: Quantity Surveyor cum Project Coordinator
description:
Responsibilities

  • Prepare tender submission, handle progress claims, variation orders and finalize project accounts.
  • Administration of tenders - prepare quotation, tender and contract documents including bill of quantities, cost estimation, cost control and budgeting.
  • Collaborate with the project team to ensure that all client requirements are met to prepare project handover documents
  • Evaluate and negotiate tenders from subcontractors and suppliers to ensure optimal terms.
  • Coordinate ID works on site
  • Assist the Project team in all aspect of project management such as project progress, monitoring, site supervision, checking of materials and workmanship, control of general workers
  • To carry out coordination and liaisons with all relevant parties
  • Support the Project manager to ensure projects are completed on time, within budget, meet all safety standards and are of highest quality.
  • Responsible for monitoring the daily process and progress at the project site
  • Conduct project site inspection.
  • Any ad hoc duties assigned

Required skills and qualifications

  • Relevant working experience in Construction / Interior Design fit-out work
  • Proven success in a corporate setting, working with all levels of management
  • Able to work under pressure
  • 'O' Level (or equivalent) and above in relevant field
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office
  • Must be able to speak and write in English and Mandarin fluently. (To liaise with mandarin speaking)

postedCompany.description: Bio-Design Pte Ltd is a leading Singaporean Interior Design consultancy, Construction and Building company. Established for close to two decades, our diverse staff team consist of core-trade specialists of various nationalities. This allows us to have a multi-disciplined team which deliver on our promise of providing our client with bold, innovative, original design solutions and building works. Our clientele spans across the Asia Pacific region, coming from different sectors which include commercial offices retail, hospitality, non-profits, residential and leisure. Our capable and committed teams of professional project managers, designers, builders and carpenters allow Bio-Design to have both the skills and resources to meet all your design and building need, right from conceptualization to concretization. Our success is propelled by a commitment to provide our clients with an affordable and seamless experience complemented by top notch customer service and management. More than just construction and renovation, we believe in turning concepts into reality.
postedCompany.name: BIO-DESIGN PTE. LTD.
